claim.summary: Refactor Receipts into modules + add schema, tests, GitHub adapter, integrity (v0.1)
claim.details: Split bin/receipts.js into src/ modules (cli, render-markdown, schema). Added JSON Schema in schemas/, unit tests, receipt schema validation on done, SHA-256 integrity hashing of payload + artifacts, and a 'receipts github comment' adapter using gh with --dry-run. Bumped version to 0.1.0.

evidence.label: v0.1 verification
evidence.note: Refactor preserves CLI behavior; smoke + unit tests + OpenSpec validation all pass.

recommended_next_action: Review the receipt and supporting evidence.
